title: Sources
subtitle: How to contact the authors and publishers
pageTitle: Sources: How to contact the authors and publishers
contentHtml:
This page contains the contact and referral information for many of the contributing authors and original publishers of materials offered on Access to Insight.

If you are trying to track down the author or publisher of a page you saw on Access to Insight, the gray box at the bottom of the page in question may have some contact information. If not, the information presented here may be helpful.

Also listed here are several distributors who offer print editions of some of the works you'll find on the website.

Amaravati Buddhist Monastery (UK)

For sutta translations by the Amaravati Sangha.

Amaravati Buddhist Monastery
St. Margarets Lane
Great Gaddesden
Hemel Hempstead
Hertfordshire HP1 3BZ
England
www.amaravati.org

Barre Center for Buddhist Studies (USA)

For sutta translations by Andrew Olendzki.

Barre Center for Buddhist Studies
149 Lockwood Road
Barre, Massachusetts 01005
USA
www.bcbsdharma.org

Bhavana Society (USA)

For the writings of Bhante H. Gunaratana.

Bhavana Society
Rte. 1, Box 218-3
Back Creek Road
High View, WV 26808
USA
www.bhavanasociety.org

Bodhi Monastery (USA)

For sutta translations and other writings by Bhikkhu Bodhi.

Bodhi Monastery
67 Lawrence Road
Lafayette, New Jersey 07848
USA
bodhimonastery.org

Buddhist Publication Society (Sri Lanka)

For books published by the Buddhist Publication Society.

The BPS is a nonprofit publisher of books on Theravada Buddhism, with an excellent international mail-order service. Their current international mail-order catalog is available from their website. The BPS runs the Nyanaponika Dhamma Dana Project, which distributes free copies of BPS publications to libraries and schools. Publications from the BPS are distributed in the USA by Pariyatti, in Canada by SourceVipassana and in Europe by Wisdom Books (You may read a selection of titles from the BPS right now.)

Buddhist Publication Society
P.O. Box 61
No. 54, Sangharaja Mawatha
Kandy
Sri Lanka
www.bps.lk

Cambridge Insight Meditation Center (USA)

For articles by Larry Rosenberg.

Cambridge Insight Meditation Center
331 Broadway
Cambridge, MA 02139
USA
www.cimc.info

dhammatalks.org (USA)

For the complete catalog of the essays, books, articles, and audio recordings of Thanissaro Bhikkhu. (See also Metta Forest Monastery)

Metta Forest Monastery (USA)

For sutta translations and other writings by Thanissaro Bhikkhu.

Metta Forest Monastery (Wat Mettavanaram) publishes and distributes free books from the Thai forest traditions, including translations of teachings by Ajaan Lee, Upasika Kee, Ajaan Fuang, and Ajaan Suwat, as well as books by Thanissaro Bhikkhu, including The Wings to Awakening: An Anthology from the Pali Canon, Mind Like Fire Unbound: An Image in the Early Buddhist Discourses, and many more.

Metta Forest Monastery
P.O. Box 1409
Valley Center, CA 92082
USA
monastery: www.watmetta.org

(See also dhammatalks.org)

The Pali Collective

For translations by the The Yahoo! Pali Collective.

The Pali Collective is a Yahoo! group with some very knowledgeable and helpful members who can help you with your Pali studies.

Pali Text Society (UK)

Since its founding in 1881, this nonprofit organization has been the world's pre-eminent publisher of texts from the Pali canon. The PTS offers offer a hardbound edition of the complete Tipitaka in romanized Pali, and most of the Tipitaka in English translation. Some of their translations of key texts are now very badly out of date, and have been superseded by more fluent translations from other publishers (for example, their translation of the Digha Nikaya dates back to 1899; Maurice Walshe's Long Discourses of The Buddha, published by Wisdom Publications in 1987, is a much more useful text). Nevertheless, many of their translations are still valuable. Their romanized Pali editions are indispensable tools for the serious Pali student. PTS books are distributed in North America by Pariyatti.

www.palitext.com

Pariyatti (USA)

Pariyatti (formerly Pariyatti Book Service) is a nonprofit bookseller with a large online catalog of books on Buddhism and meditation from various publishers. Pariyatti is the official North American distributor for the Buddhist Publication Society and the Pali Text Society.

Pariyatti
867 Larmon Road
Onalaska, WA 98570
USA
www.pariyatti.com

Sanghaloka Forest Hermitage (Australia)

For articles by Bhikkhu Ariyesako.

Sanghaloka Forest Hermitage
PO Box 152
Kallista
Victoria 3791
Australia

Sati Saraniya Hermitage (Canada)

For articles by Ayya Medhanandi.

Sati Saraniya Hermitage
1702 McVeigh Road
RR #7
Perth, ON K7H 3C9
Canada

SourceVipassana (Canada)

Canadian distributor of books published by the Buddhist Publication Society.

Tel: +1 613.267.3973
www.sourcevipassana.ca

Wat Pah Baan Taad (Thailand)

For books by Ajaan Maha Boowa.

Wat Pah Baan Taad is the forest monastery of which Ajaan Maha Boowa was abbot. Their website provides a list of free books by Maha Boowa, many of which are available upon request in both print and electronic formats.

Wat Pah Baan Taad
Baan Taad
Ampher Meuang
Udorn Thani 41000
Thailand
www.luangta.com

Wisdom Books (UK)

European distributor of books published by the Buddhist Publication Society.

Wisdom Books
25 Stanley Road
Ilford
Essex IG1 1RW
England
www.wisdom-books.com

Wisdom Publications (USA)

Wisdom is a nonprofit publisher and distributor of Buddhist books, including several important modern translations of the Digha, Majjhima, Samyutta, and Anguttara Nikayas.

Wisdom Publications
199 Elm Street
Somerville, MA 02144
USA
www.wisdompubs.org
